title: Shulker Armor Stand Fix
description: Hacky fix for the bug MC-266334 which allows shulkers to break armor stands from versions 1.20.2-1.20.4
body:
Hacky fix for the bug [MC-266334](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-266334) which allows shulkers to break armor stand from versions 1.20.2-1.20.4

This mod is basically a replica of [this](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerfix) mod but their version (for some to me unknown reason) only supports the version 1.21.1 (where this bug is already fixed) so I downported it to the versions it actually needs to be
